calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Daniel Stern, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 735 Taylor I1, LLC,
Witness Lisa Levy and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant John Edwards.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 735 Taylor Street #204, San Francisco, California 94108.

Damages $1242.24
Holdover damages $4876.75
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
for a Total Judgment of $6118.99

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Steve Collier; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 735 Taylor 11, LLC is present. Represented by.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Edwards is present.
Attorney appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-19-2016 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
